hero.description: The ultimate platform for elite professionals. Intelligent scheduling, client management, and full white-labeling.

features.description: We design every feature to save you time and elevate your personal brand.
features.agenda_desc: Your public link detects free spots and blocks clashes automatically.
features.agenda_save: Save up to {{count}} hours per week.
features.white_label_desc: Customize logo and colors for a high-level corporate identity.

pricing.subtitle: No surprises. Just the power you need.

basic.title: Basic Plan
basic.wa_message: Hi, I'm interested in activating the Basic Plan of ProNexusGlobal for my business.

pro.title: Pro Plan
pro.desc: For experts who accept no limits.
pro.wa_message: Hi, I'm interested in activating the Pro Elite Plan of ProNexusGlobal. I want all features without limits.

t1.text: ProNexusGlobal removed the chaos from my reception. My revenue grew 30% thanks to the automatic scheduling.
t1.author: Dr. Roberto M.

t2.text: The platform's aesthetics are impeccable. My clients notice the difference in professionalism from the first appointment.
t2.author: Andrea Ruiz, JD

t3.text: It's the most powerful tool I've used to scale my practice. WhatsApp reminders are key.
t3.author: Coach Julian T.
